response.global_analysis:
1. Streamer & Language: The video features Ninomae Ina'nis primarily speaking English, and interacting with Natsuiro Matsuri in Japanese.
2. Context: Ina is farming pumpkins and carrots in Minecraft, trying to reach 1 million yen, and later sells her harvested items at the market.
3. Translation & Timing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to the spoken audio. English/Japanese dialogues are accurately transcribed and translated. Humming/cutesy noises are included where prominent.

subtitles.original: I also wanna try out the minigame.
subtitles.english: I also wanna try out the minigame.

subtitles.original: Oh, we might reach one million today!
subtitles.english: Oh, we might reach one million today!

subtitles.original: But they raised pumpkins too, so...
subtitles.english: But they raised pumpkins too, so...

subtitles.original: I assume pumpkins will be worth selling now.
subtitles.english: I assume pumpkins will be worth selling now.

subtitles.original: Maybe if pumpkins are good enough, we'll just increase the number of pumpkin farms.
subtitles.english: Maybe if pumpkins are good enough, we'll just increase the number of pumpkin farms.

subtitles.original: Okay, so when I go to town, I need to buy more honey.
subtitles.english: Okay, so when I go to town, I need to buy more honey.

subtitles.original: I'll buy... uh, three stacks of honey. I don't know if all these bees are worth it, to be honest, but...
subtitles.english: I'll buy... uh, three stacks of honey. I don't know if all these bees are worth it, to be honest, but...

subtitles.original: I'll take a whole bunch of pumpkins to sell.
subtitles.english: I'll take a whole bunch of pumpkins to sell.

subtitles.original: Okay, gotta quickly get to the... the place and then see how... how much money I can make.
subtitles.english: Okay, gotta quickly get to the... the place and then see how... how much money I can make.

subtitles.original: We'll see how the stocks are, too.
subtitles.english: We'll see how the stocks are, too.

subtitles.original: Another Shulker would be nice, too. Maybe.
subtitles.english: Another Shulker would be nice, too. Maybe.

subtitles.original: They said they're gonna increase the points, but I think they decided against that, so I would have to respec if I wanted to.
subtitles.english: They said they're gonna increase the points, but I think they decided against that, so I would have to respec if I wanted to.

subtitles.original: 今日、暗くない？ / 暗くないです！
subtitles.english: Isn't it dark today? / It's not dark!

subtitles.original: いいな、いいな。え、ファーマーどう？
種売ってよ、かぼちゃとか。
subtitles.english: Sell me some seeds, like pumpkins.

subtitles.original: なんか、蜂の... 蜂とか、蜂蜜とか売ってよ、まつりに。
subtitles.english: Like, bees... or honey, sell them to Matsuri.

subtitles.original: お？ 蜂を？ 蜂蜜ですね。
なんでも売ってよ、売ってよ。
じゃ、あとで、マーケットで売るから。
subtitles.english: Then, later. I'll sell them at the market.

subtitles.original: よろしく！売っといて、フリーマーケットで。買うから。 / はい！
subtitles.english: Please! Put them up on the flea market. I'll buy them. / Yes!

subtitles.original: It's the same as cake now.
subtitles.english: It's the same as cake now.
